title: Why Automatic Data Processing Is A Top 25 Dividend Giant

title: Automatic Data Processing's Business Model Supports Dividend Growth

title: Will ADP Stock Trend Lower?

title: ADP Named One of the "World's Most Admired Companies" for 16th Straight Year

title: Designing a Winning Team: ADP Sponsors Elite Global Roster of Golf Pros
